reviews.review_description: A lot of reviews people write are meme reviews, or reviews of people that judged the game to quickly. Wild is not your average vr game. Wild is the closet thing we've had to ready player one. The fact that everyone is on the same server makes it completely different than most games. The devs even care about there game and host events like never before. If you ever wanted to be a completely different person this is the game for you

I downloaded this game with the intention of having fun however this game is actually a virus as it carries the hidden feature of within 1 minute of playing the game it activates and makes you want to kill yourself due to how boring it is. I genuinely hope this game flops as I’m pretty sure the devs are too busy getting naked in front of minors rather than making this any sort of playable. You can’t build on private plots as they are all taken and getting a single block to build with is like working a 9-5 in demolition with a toothpick that you can barely mine with and the game is overall just not fun. The only thing I built was a 3x3 platform before it got instantly griefed by Benjamin Netanyahu’s greatest soldiers known as squeakers in free-build. This game definitely has made a few suicide notes become written but I think if anyone takes there own life the cops can just look at this game and instantly figure out why someone is hanging from a ceiling fan. It was advertised as the replacement to rec room but I know for a fact the devs have never even heard of rec room until it got shut down so it’s just false advertising.

After loading in the game i was greeted and called the hard r slur and the f slur do NOT trust anyone with ur builds they will grief it and the admins in the game ban random people they are abusing there power please do NOT get this game , the own moderators and admins destroy all of ur builds and im pretty sure the owner of this game is a pedo so guys DO NOT GET THIS GAME this game is a trap

Wild is a very fun, free to play game. I think it is very similar to Minecraft but in vr. This game might be the future of vr also because it is very unique, creative, fun, chill, and just it is an overall very fun vr game to play with your friends in.
Its very fun

This is my opinion btw. Wild is pretty cool but it’s kinda just a copy and paste of factions. They say it’s gonna replace Recroom but it’s not. Just a bunch of little kids not trying to be rude. Hey but the creators are pretty nice though

reviews.review_title: Nothing to do. (Devs please read this)
reviews.review_description: First of all, you need to wait 1,000 years to even load in, and when thar finnaly happens, you get bored after 5 minutes. All you can do is walk around... and that's it besides for an EXTREMELY limited and over-populated build area. You're also trapped in a very small map, and with the player count, it fills up fast. The only other thing you can do is beg mods or other people for cosmetics, which don't actually do anything besides change your apperance. Even with the cosmetics though, there is nothing you can do to personalize your duck, because either your naked, or your wearing the same cosmetics as everyone else. The only real thing this game has going for it is it's graphics and face tracking, while although they're not my taste, it is impressive. I feel like this is a step down from Factions, Wild feels like it's just Factions, but they take away 90% of the features. In, Factions, there was an infinite map to explore, highly detailed and developed PvP, Faction totems to claim land, crafting, diffrent mining tools, and an actual sense of comunity. While in Wild, it's the same game but with only backpacks, and limited mining and building. In conclusion, unless it's heavily modified, Wild will never become even half the game Factions was.

This is probably the best vr game I’ve played aside from rec room. I love that fact that they use gtag movement but in a different way and the fact that they tried to add a bunch of stuff from games we love. Like building and mining blocks and having a world made of blocks (Minecraft) then they made sure to add recroom stuff and most importantly we can’t forget my favourite place. Memory lane. Aside from those the game is relatively good for being in early access. And the mods and owner are really nice. I can’t wait for it to be fully released aka no more server shutdowns after events. Thanks dowd and everyone that made this game. It’s truely a really good game that I believe will help people strive to become content creators or just have fun 10000000/10 ❤️

I’m a beta tester and a content creator on this game I’ve been waiting so long for it to come out. I love it forever is the best people are so kind and the server is literally crashed. It’s so fun. I’m planning on playing it every single day and trying to get moderator love the game hopefully I get mod.

It’s so awesome that we as a community have something we can do to honor one of the greatest games on vr. Even if you didn’t play the game you have to acknowledge the impact it made on vr history. Wild vr has brought this opportunity into Vr by hosting what will hopefully go down in Vr history to be one of the greatest events. Thank you to whoever the owner is and all the developers of the game. 5 stars for sure
